understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a grid-based puzzle by modifying a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation through modifier tiles to match goal cell requirements, then step onto activated goals to clear them. Complete all goals across multiple levels to win while managing stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max. Blocked directions indicate walls. Shape modifiers cycle piece shape (0-5), color modifiers cycle color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), rotation modifiers rotate piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals advances to next level. Losing all lives ends the game.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a grid-based puzzle by modifying a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation through modifier tiles to match goal cell requirements, then step onto activated goals to clear them. Complete all goals across multiple levels to win while managing stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max. Blocked directions indicate walls. Shape modifiers cycle piece shape (0-5), color modifiers cycle color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), rotation modifiers rotate piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals advances to next level. Losing all lives ends the game.
